summary: Publish-time correctness + live-gate fixes: classified insight-fetch errors, MAX(id) latest-row tiebreaker, tolerant timestamp parsing, brands rm not-found exit, hashtags search example, go 1.26.4 toolchain.
reason: Code review and the live publish gate surfaced: silent zero-fill on auth/transport errors, duplicate rows on same-second pulls, weeks_covered=0 from strict RFC3339, brands rm exit 0 on missing slug, an invalid UUID example on the token-scoped hashtag search, and go1.26.3 stdlib vulns fixed in 1.26.4.
validated_outcome: publish validate 11/11 PASS (incl. govulncheck 0); live dogfood 111/111 PASS.
